summary: The Orus foundation specification pack is complete, self-contained, and ready for domain-spec implementation planning. This re-run resolves review findings FND-010, FND-012, and FND-013 without reopening discovery: the supersession policy now protects every decision sourced from an explicit human or owner answer, including D-016; duplicate clarification q-0002 is reconciled to the authoritative human answer in q-0001; and the exact approved MIT notice remains unchanged. All four foundation files are Ready, and SPECS.md contains the complete Foundation and M0-M11 phase roadmap plus the required domain specification template. No open foundation question remains.
